---
title: "WR696_objective_2"
author: "Lynette Schwanger"
date: "2026-04-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(broom)
```

```{r}
pre_q <- read_csv("data/LE_Qseries.csv")

head(pre_q)
```

```{r}
pre_q <- pre_q |>
  filter(date_time >= as_datetime("2024-07-17 00:00:00"), date_time <= as_datetime("2025-07-21 23:59:59")) |>
  mutate(date = as_date(date_time))
```

```{r}
pre_q_long <- pre_q |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(ds_stage_ft, ds_q_cfs, us_stage_ft, us_q_cfs), names_to = c("location", ".value"), names_pattern = "(ds|us)_(.*)") |>
  mutate(location = if_else(location == "ds", "Downstream", "Upstream"))
```

```{r}
fits <- pre_q_long |>
  filter(stage_ft > 0, q_cfs > 0) |>  
  group_by(location) |>
  summarise(model   = list(lm(log(q_cfs) ~ log(stage_ft), data = cur_data())), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(a = map_dbl(model, ~ exp(coef(.x)[1])),   
    b = map_dbl(model, ~ coef(.x)[2]),         
    r2 = map_dbl(model, ~ summary(.x)$r.squared),
    label = paste0("Q = ", round(a, 3), " · h^", round(b, 3),
                   "\nR² = ", round(r2, 3)))

fits |> select(location, a, b, r2)
```

```{r}
fits_nls <- pre_q_long |>
  filter(stage_ft > 0, q_cfs > 0) |>
  group_by(location) |>
  summarise(
    model   = list(nls(q_cfs ~ a * stage_ft^b,
                       data = cur_data(),
                       start = list(a = 1, b = 1))),
    ss_tot  = sum((q_cfs - mean(q_cfs))^2),   
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    a  = map_dbl(model, ~ coef(.x)["a"]),
    b  = map_dbl(model, ~ coef(.x)["b"]),
    r2 = map2_dbl(model, ss_tot,
                  ~ 1 - sum(residuals(.x)^2) / .y)
  )

fits_nls |> select(location, a, b, r2)
```

```{r}
equation_labels <- fits_nls |>
  mutate(label = paste0("Q = ", round(a, 2), " · h^", round(b, 2),
                        "\nR² = ", round(r2, 3)), 
         location = factor(location, levels = c("Upstream", "Downstream")))
```


```{r}
#gah need to fix so upstream is first
ggplot(pre_q_long |> 
         filter(stage_ft > 0, q_cfs > 0) |>
       mutate(location = factor(location, levels = c("Upstream", "Downstream"))), 
       aes(x = stage_ft, y = q_cfs)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = "Observed"), alpha = 1, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = "Fitted Rating Curve"), method = "nls",
              method.args = list(formula = y ~ a * x^b,
                                 start = list(a = 1, b = 1)),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Observed" = "steelblue2", "Fitted Rating Curve" = "navy")) +
  facet_wrap(~ location) +
  labs(title = "Stage-Discharge Rating Curves at Lower Elkhorn Pre-Restoration",
    subtitle = "July 2024 to July 2025",
    x  = "Stage (ft)",
    y = "Discharge (cfs)", 
    color = NULL) +
  geom_text(data = equation_labels,
          aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label),
          hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5,
          size = 3.5, fontface = "italic",
          inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), legend.position = c(0.10, .85), legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "grey80"))
```

#curious how rating curve relates to seasons
```{r}
pre_q_long_seasons <- pre_q_long |>
  mutate(season = case_when(
    month(date_time) %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Winter",
    month(date_time) %in% c(3, 4, 5)  ~ "Spring",
    month(date_time) %in% c(6, 7, 8)  ~ "Summer",
    month(date_time) %in% c(9, 10, 11) ~ "Fall"))
```

```{r}
#oh but I want upstream plot on the left
pre_q_long_seasons <- pre_q_long_seasons |>
  mutate(location = factor(location, levels = c("Upstream", "Downstream")))

```


```{r}
#color observed by season
#oh duh, no winter data
#oh and I want the upstream plot on the left, fixed equation labels

ggplot(pre_q_long_seasons |> 
         filter(stage_ft > 0, q_cfs > 0) |>
         mutate(location = factor(location, levels = c("Upstream", "Downstream"))), 
       aes(x = stage_ft, y = q_cfs)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = season), alpha = 0.8, size = 1) +
scale_color_manual(values = c("Spring" = "forestgreen",
                               "Summer" = "goldenrod",
                               "Fall"   = "sienna"),
                   name = "Season") +
  geom_smooth(aes(linetype = "Fitted Rating Curve"),
            method = "nls",
            method.args = list(formula = y ~ a * x^b,
                               start = list(a = 1, b = 1)),
            se = FALSE, color = "navy", linewidth = 1) +
scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Fitted Rating Curve" = "solid"),
                      name = NULL) +
  facet_wrap(~ location) +
  labs(title = "Stage-Discharge Rating Curves at Lower Elkhorn Pre-Restoration",
    subtitle = "July 2024 to July 2025",
    x  = "Stage (ft)",
    y = "Discharge (cfs)", 
    color = NULL) +
  geom_text(data = equation_labels,
          aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label),
          hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5,
          size = 3.5, fontface = "italic",
          inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), legend.position = c(0.10, .85), legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "grey80"))

```

```{r}
#why those yellow summer points off to the right of the rating curve?
outliers <- pre_q_long_seasons |>
  filter(location == "Downstream",
         season == "Summer",
         stage_ft > 1.3) |>
  distinct(date) |>
  arrange(date)

print(outliers)
#maybe a storm on 8-9-2024? 
#and then something happened from 6-1-2024 to 6-9-2024, maybe peak snow melt?
```


#post restoration
```{r}
q <- read_csv("data/LE_Qseries.csv")
```

```{r}
post_q <- q |>
  filter(date_time >= as_datetime("2025-08-05 00:00:00")) |>
  mutate(date = as_date(date_time))
```

```{r}
post_q_long <- post_q |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(ds_stage_ft, ds_q_cfs, us_stage_ft, us_q_cfs), names_to = c("location", ".value"), names_pattern = "(ds|us)_(.*)") |>
  mutate(location = if_else(location == "ds", "Downstream", "Upstream"))
```

```{r}
fits_post <- post_q_long |>
  filter(stage_ft > 0, q_cfs > 0) |>  
  group_by(location) |>
  summarise(model   = list(lm(log(q_cfs) ~ log(stage_ft), data = cur_data())), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(a = map_dbl(model, ~ exp(coef(.x)[1])),   
    b = map_dbl(model, ~ coef(.x)[2]),         
    r2 = map_dbl(model, ~ summary(.x)$r.squared),
    label = paste0("Q = ", round(a, 3), " · h^", round(b, 3),
                   "\nR² = ", round(r2, 3)))

fits_post |> select(location, a, b, r2)
```

```{r}
fits_nls_post <- post_q_long |>
  filter(stage_ft > 0, q_cfs > 0) |>
  group_by(location) |>
  summarise(
    model   = list(nls(q_cfs ~ a * stage_ft^b,
                       data = cur_data(),
                       start = list(a = 1, b = 1))),
    ss_tot  = sum((q_cfs - mean(q_cfs))^2),   
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    a  = map_dbl(model, ~ coef(.x)["a"]),
    b  = map_dbl(model, ~ coef(.x)["b"]),
    r2 = map2_dbl(model, ss_tot,
                  ~ 1 - sum(residuals(.x)^2) / .y)
  )

fits_nls_post |> select(location, a, b, r2)
```

```{r}
equation_labels_post <- fits_nls_post |>
  mutate(label = paste0("Q = ", round(a, 2), " · h^", round(b, 2),
                        "\nR² = ", round(r2, 3)), 
         location = factor(location, levels = c("Upstream", "Downstream")))
```


```{r}
ggplot(post_q_long |> 
         filter(stage_ft > 0, q_cfs > 0) |>
       mutate(location = factor(location, levels = c("Upstream", "Downstream"))), 
       aes(x = stage_ft, y = q_cfs)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = "Observed"), alpha = 1, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = "Fitted Rating Curve"), method = "nls",
              method.args = list(formula = y ~ a * x^b,
                                 start = list(a = 1, b = 1)),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Observed" = "steelblue2", "Fitted Rating Curve" = "navy")) +
  facet_wrap(~ location) +
  labs(title = "Stage-Discharge Rating Curves at Lower Elkhorn Post-Restoration",
    subtitle = "August 2025 to October 2025",
    x  = "Stage (ft)",
    y = "Discharge (cfs)", 
    color = NULL) +
  geom_text(data = equation_labels_post,
          aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label),
          hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5,
          size = 3.5, fontface = "italic",
          inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), legend.position = c(0.10, .85), legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "grey80"))
```

```{r}
equation_labels_combined <- bind_rows(
  fits_nls |> mutate(period = "Pre-Restoration"),
  fits_nls_post |> mutate(period = "Post-Restoration")
) |>
  mutate(
    label    = paste0("Q = ", round(a, 2), " · h^", round(b, 2),
                      "\nR² = ", round(r2, 3)),
    location = factor(location, levels = c("Upstream", "Downstream")),
    period   = factor(period, levels = c("Pre-Restoration", "Post-Restoration"))
  )
```


```{r}
combined_q <- bind_rows(
  pre_q_long |> mutate(period = "Pre-Restoration"),
  post_q_long |> mutate(period = "Post-Restoration")
) |>
  filter(stage_ft > 0, q_cfs > 0) |>
  mutate(
    location = factor(location, levels = c("Upstream", "Downstream")),
    period   = factor(period, levels = c("Pre-Restoration", "Post-Restoration"))
  )

# plot
ggplot(combined_q, aes(x = stage_ft, y = q_cfs)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = period), alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = period),
              method = "nls",
              method.args = list(formula = y ~ a * x^b,
                                 start = list(a = 1, b = 1)),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre-Restoration"  = "steelblue1",
                                "Post-Restoration" = "navy"),
                     name = NULL) +
  facet_wrap(~ location) +
  labs(
    title    = "Stage-Discharge Rating Curves at Lower Elkhorn",
    subtitle = "Pre- vs. Post-Restoration",
    x        = "Stage (ft)",
    y        = "Discharge (cfs)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = c(0.10, 0.85),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "grey80")
  )
```


```{r}
ggplot(combined_q, aes(x = stage_ft, y = q_cfs)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = period), alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = period),
              method = "nls",
              method.args = list(formula = y ~ a * x^b,
                                 start = list(a = 1, b = 1)),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre-Restoration"  = "steelblue",
                                "Post-Restoration" = "navy"),
                     name = NULL) +
  # pre-restoration equations bottom-right
  geom_text(data = equation_labels_combined |> 
              filter(period == "Pre-Restoration"),
            aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label),
            hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5,
            size = 3, fontface = "italic",
            color = "steelblue",
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # post-restoration equations above pre
  geom_text(data = equation_labels_combined |> 
              filter(period == "Post-Restoration"),
            aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label),
            hjust = 1.1, vjust = -3.5,
            size = 3, fontface = "italic",
            color = "navy",
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ location) +
  labs(
    title    = "Stage-Discharge Rating Curves at Lower Elkhorn",
    subtitle = "Pre- vs. Post-Restoration",
    x        = "Stage (ft)",
    y        = "Discharge (cfs)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title        = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background  = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    strip.text        = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position   = c(0.10, 0.85),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "grey80")
  )
```


```{r}
q_field <- read_csv("data/LE_Qseries_field.csv")
```

```{r}
q_field_long <- q_field |>
  select(date_time, ds_q_cfs, us_q_cfs) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ds_q_cfs, us_q_cfs),
    names_to = c("location", ".value"),
    names_pattern = "(ds|us)_(.*)"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    location = if_else(location == "ds", "Downstream", "Upstream"),
    period   = case_when(
      as_date(date_time) <= ymd("2025-07-20") ~ "Pre-Restoration",
      as_date(date_time) >= ymd("2025-08-05") ~ "Post-Restoration"),
    location = factor(location, levels = c("Upstream", "Downstream")),
    period   = factor(period, levels = c("Pre-Restoration", 
                                         "Post-Restoration"))
  )
```

#new color scheme
#final hydrograph:
```{r}
ggplot(q_field_long, aes(x = date_time, y = q_cfs, color = location)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Upstream"   = "forestgreen",
                                "Downstream" = "navy"),
                     name = NULL) +
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = as_datetime("2025-07-20"), 
           xmax = as_datetime("2025-08-05"),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.4) +
  annotate("text",
           x = as_datetime("2025-07-28"),
           y = Inf,
           label = "Restoration\nPeriod",
           vjust = 1.2, size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as_datetime("2026-04-16"),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  annotate("text",
           x = as_datetime("2026-04-16"),
           y = Inf,
           label = "Field Day\nMeasurement",
           vjust = 1.2, hjust = 1.1, size = 3, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ location, ncol = 1) +          # stack vertically
  labs(
    title    = "Streamflow Hydrograph at Lower Elkhorn",
    subtitle = "Pre- and Post-Restoration",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Discharge (cfs)"
  ) +
  scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title        = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position   = "none",              # redundant with facet labels
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```

#closer look at post-restoration
```{r}
ggplot(q_field_long |> filter(period == "Post-Restoration", date_time <= as_datetime("2025-12-31")),
       aes(x = date_time, y = q_cfs, color = location)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Upstream"   = "steelblue",
                                "Downstream" = "navy"),
                     name = NULL) +
  facet_wrap(~ location, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title    = "Streamflow Hydrograph at Lower Elkhorn - Post-Restoration",
    subtitle = "August 2025 - October 2025",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Discharge (cfs)"
  ) +
  scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "1 month") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```


#new color scheme for rating curve:
```{r}
# create color grouping variable
combined_q <- combined_q |>
  mutate(color_group = case_when(
    period == "Pre-Restoration"                             ~ "Pre-Restoration",
    period == "Post-Restoration" & location == "Upstream"   ~ "Upstream Post-Restoration",
    period == "Post-Restoration" & location == "Downstream" ~ "Downstream Post-Restoration"
  ),
  color_group = factor(color_group, levels = c("Pre-Restoration",
                                               "Upstream Post-Restoration",
                                               "Downstream Post-Restoration")))

ggplot(combined_q, aes(x = stage_ft, y = q_cfs)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = color_group), alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = color_group),
              method = "nls",
              method.args = list(formula = y ~ a * x^b,
                                 start = list(a = 1, b = 1)),
              se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Pre-Restoration"             = "grey60",
               "Upstream Post-Restoration"   = "forestgreen",
               "Downstream Post-Restoration" = "navy"),
    name = NULL) +
  # pre-restoration equations bottom-right
  geom_text(data = equation_labels_combined |>
              filter(period == "Pre-Restoration"),
            aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label),
            hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5,
            size = 3, fontface = "italic",
            color = "grey30",
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # post-restoration equations above pre
  geom_text(data = equation_labels_combined |>
              filter(period == "Post-Restoration",
                     location == "Upstream"),
            aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label),
            hjust = 1.1, vjust = -2.7,
            size = 3, fontface = "italic",
            color = "forestgreen",
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = equation_labels_combined |>
              filter(period == "Post-Restoration",
                     location == "Downstream"),
            aes(x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = label),
            hjust = 1.1, vjust = -2.7,
            size = 3, fontface = "italic",
            color = "navy",
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ location) +
  labs(
    title    = "Stage-Discharge Rating Curves at Lower Elkhorn",
    subtitle = "Pre- vs. Post-Restoration",
    x        = "Stage (ft)",
    y        = "Discharge (cfs)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title        = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background  = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    strip.text        = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position   = c(0.14, 0.88),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "grey80")
  )
```

#looking into stage-discharge upstream: 
```{r}
post_q_long |>
  filter(location == "Upstream",
         q_cfs > 30) |>
  summarise(
    min_date = min(date_time),
    max_date = max(date_time),
    max_q    = max(q_cfs)
  )
```
